title: Finish strict require completion ordering on top of shared coordination publication
summary: Make the final strict model fully real by enforcing the ordering from the shared-refs doc: user code publish stays branch-scoped, PRISM finalizes allowlisted projection state, the branch is pushed, shared coordination publication succeeds, and only then does the task become globally completed so downstream agents never act on false completion.

acceptance.label: Global task completion is impossible before shared coordination publication succeeds.
Branch publication success without shared coordination publication no longer creates a false globally completed task state.
